tab.title: Layout
tab.description: Switch built-in layout presets, adjust ActivityBar placement, or reset to default. Layout changes save automatically.

focusWriting.name: Focus Writing
focusWriting.description: Hide all panels except the conversation, for long-form writing.

developer.name: Developer
developer.description: Files + Git on the left, AI on the right, Terminal + Problems at the bottom.

taskCockpit.name: Task Cockpit
taskCockpit.description: Todo + Requirements on the left, conversation in the center, Scheduler + Long Goals on the right.

panorama.name: Panorama
panorama.description: All panels visible, ideal for multi-task coordination.

activityBar.description: Position of the module navigation rail. When hidden, a floating button gives quick access.

actions.transferDescription: Share layouts as JSON files across devices or teammates.

exportMode.label: Export scope
exportMode.snapshotHint: Best for sharing a single setup

custom.empty: No custom layouts saved yet. After editing your layout, click "Save current as..." to create one.

renameDialog.title: Rename layout
renameDialog.message: Give this layout a new name.

saveDialog.title: Save current layout
saveDialog.message: Give this layout a memorable name. You can switch back from the menu any time.
saveDialog.errorDuplicate: A layout with this name already exists

dnd.rejected: This module cannot be placed here
